# Release Draft (2026-03-09)

## Suggested Title

`Initial runtime import and core documentation cleanup`

## Short Copy-Paste Body

LingoNexus now has its first complete repository baseline.

- Imports the full runtime, including API, core, language sandboxes, Spring Boot starter, examples, and testcase modules.
- Consolidates docs to a smaller core set focused on architecture, quick start, diagnostics, build troubleshooting, project status, requirements, performance baseline, and todo planning.
- Adds a Windows-friendly verification workflow through `scripts/verified-build.ps1` with reusable modes, focused profiles, built-in help, and generated preset documentation.
- Treats generated performance reports as local or CI artifacts that can be regenerated on demand.

中文摘要：

- 导入完整的 LingoNexus 运行时，包括 API、Core、各语言沙箱、Spring Boot starter、示例与 testcase 模块。
- 将仓库文档收敛到核心集合，重点保留架构、快速开始、诊断、构建排障、项目状态、需求、性能基线与后续计划。
- 增加 Windows 友好的验证工作流 `scripts/verified-build.ps1`，支持模式预设、聚焦 profile、内置帮助与预设文档生成。
- 性能报告现在作为本地或 CI 产物按需生成，不再需要长期保留在仓库中。

## Full Copy-Paste Body

LingoNexus now has its first complete repository baseline.

### Highlights

- Imports the full runtime, including `lingonexus-api`, `lingonexus-core`, language sandboxes, Spring Boot starter, examples, and testcase modules.
- Consolidates repository docs to a smaller core set centered on architecture, quick start, diagnostics, build troubleshooting, project status, requirements, performance baseline, and todo planning.
- Adds a Windows-friendly verification workflow through `scripts/verified-build.ps1` with reusable modes, focused profiles, built-in help, and generated preset documentation.
- Adds generated preset reference support through `scripts/generate-build-presets-doc.ps1` and `scripts/BUILD_PRESETS.md`.

### Build and Verification

- Adds `.gitignore` and `.gitattributes` for cleaner repository hygiene and LF-oriented text handling.
- Adds `verified-build.ps1` support for:
  - mode presets: `Core`, `Selective`, `Quick`, `Full`
  - focused profiles: `ExternalProcess`, `Diagnostics`, `SpringBoot`, `Performance`
  - discovery commands: `-ListModes`, `-ListProfiles`, `-ShowMode`, `-ShowProfile`
  - documentation refresh commands: `-RefreshDocs`, `-RefreshDocsOnly`
- Keeps `scripts/run-performance-baselines.ps1` as the on-demand benchmark and report entrypoint.

### Documentation Cleanup

- Keeps the main reader path focused on:
  - `README.md`
  - `README.zh-CN.md`
  - `docs/INDEX.md`
  - `docs/architecture.md`
  - `docs/quick-start.md`
  - `docs/diagnostics.md`
  - `docs/build-troubleshooting.md`
  - `docs/project-status.md`
  - `docs/requirements.md`
  - `docs/performance-baseline.md`
  - `docs/todo-plan.md`
- Removes older summary, alignment, and design-analysis documents that no longer belong on the primary documentation path.
- Simplifies README navigation so new readers can quickly reach docs, build guidance, and verification presets.

### Cleanup

- Removes local verification repositories, build outputs, generated performance reports, temporary logs, IDE directories, and other machine-specific artifacts from the committed working tree.
- Treats generated performance reports as local or CI artifacts that can be regenerated on demand instead of remaining committed in the repository.

### Notes

- This release is primarily a repository import, cleanup, and developer-experience baseline rather than a single runtime feature drop.

---

### 中文完整说明

本次更新建立了 LingoNexus 的第一版完整仓库基线。

#### 亮点

- 导入完整的 LingoNexus 运行时，包括 `lingonexus-api`、`lingonexus-core`、各语言沙箱、Spring Boot starter、示例代码和 testcase 模块。
- 将仓库文档收敛到更小的核心集合，重点保留架构、快速开始、诊断、构建排障、项目状态、需求、性能基线与后续计划。
- 增加 Windows 友好的验证工作流：`scripts/verified-build.ps1`，支持模式预设、聚焦 profile、内置帮助和预设文档生成。
- 增加构建预设静态文档支持：`scripts/generate-build-presets-doc.ps1` 与 `scripts/BUILD_PRESETS.md`。

#### 构建与验证

- 增加 `.gitignore` 与 `.gitattributes`，改善仓库卫生和 LF 文本处理策略。
- `verified-build.ps1` 现已支持：
  - mode 预设：`Core`、`Selective`、`Quick`、`Full`
  - 聚焦 profile：`ExternalProcess`、`Diagnostics`、`SpringBoot`、`Performance`
  - 发现命令：`-ListModes`、`-ListProfiles`、`-ShowMode`、`-ShowProfile`
  - 文档刷新命令：`-RefreshDocs`、`-RefreshDocsOnly`
- 保留 `scripts/run-performance-baselines.ps1` 作为按需生成性能报告的入口脚本。

#### 文档清理

- 主阅读路径现在聚焦于：`README.md`、`README.zh-CN.md`、`docs/INDEX.md`、`docs/architecture.md`、`docs/quick-start.md`、`docs/diagnostics.md`、`docs/build-troubleshooting.md`、`docs/project-status.md`、`docs/requirements.md`、`docs/performance-baseline.md`、`docs/todo-plan.md`。
- 移除了不再属于主阅读路径的旧摘要文档、对齐总结文档和设计分析文档。
- 简化了 README 导航，使新读者可以更快到达文档、构建说明和验证预设。

#### 清理

- 从提交前工作树中移除本地验证仓库、构建产物、生成的性能报告、临时日志、IDE 目录及其他机器相关文件。
- 性能报告现在被视为本地或 CI 产物，可按需重新生成，不再默认保留在仓库中。

#### 说明

- 这次发布的重点是仓库导入、清理和开发体验基线建设，而不是单一运行时功能点。
